summary: The average number of youth in Close to Home aftercare rose 47 percent between Fiscal 2024 and Fiscal 2025 alone. ACS attributes the increase directly to a rising number of youth being released from Close to Home residential placement into aftercare over the same period — more releases mechanically means more youth in aftercare at any given time, not a change in how aftercare itself is run.
oneLiner: increasing, mechanically tracking more youth released into aftercare
